title: Database
description: Schema for an Amazon Timestream database resource that serves as a container for tables storing time series data with configurable encryption and retention settings.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name that uniquely identifies this database.

DatabaseName.description: The name of the Timestream database.

TableCount.description: The total number of tables found within the Timestream database.

KmsKeyId.description: The identifier of the KMS key used to encrypt the data stored in the database.

CreationTime.description: The time when the database was created, in ISO 8601 format.

LastUpdatedTime.description: The last time that this database was updated, in ISO 8601 format.

Tables.description: The tables contained within this database.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name that uniquely identifies this table.

TableName.description: The name of the Timestream table.

DatabaseName.description: The name of the database that contains this table.

TableStatus.description: The current state of the table.

RetentionProperties.description: The retention duration configuration for the table.

MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours.description: The duration for which data must be stored in the memory store.

MagneticStoreRetentionPeriodInDays.description: The duration for which data must be stored in the magnetic store.

MagneticStoreWriteProperties.description: Configuration for writing to the magnetic store.

EnableMagneticStoreWrites.description: A flag to enable magnetic store writes.
